export const BIKES = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Thunderbolt X1",
    type: "Mountain",
    price: 25,
    rating: 4.9,
    reviews: 128,
    available: true,
    battery: null,
    speed: "45 km/h",
    weight: "12 kg",
    color: "#e74c3c",
    emoji: "🚵",
    features: ["Disc Brakes", "21-Speed", "Suspension Fork", "All-terrain"],
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Volt Pro 3000",
    type: "Electric",
    price: 45,
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 96,
    available: true,
    battery: 85,
    speed: "60 km/h",
    weight: "18 kg",
    color: "#00d4aa",
    emoji: "⚡",
    features: ["500W Motor", "60km Range", "USB Charge", "Smart Display"],
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Urban Glide S",
    type: "City",
    price: 15,
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 214,
    available: true,
    battery: null,
    speed: "30 km/h",
    weight: "10 kg",
    color: "#f39c12",
    emoji: "🚲",
    features: ["7-Speed", "Fenders", "Rear Rack", "Bell"],
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Zipster Neo",
    type: "Scooter",
    price: 20,
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 87,
    available: false,
    battery: 72,
    speed: "50 km/h",
    weight: "14 kg",
    color: "#9b59b6",
    emoji: "🛴",
    features: ["350W Motor", "Foldable", "LED Lights", "App Control"],
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Summit Beast 29",
    type: "Mountain",
    price: 30,
    rating: 4.9,
    reviews: 63,
    available: true,
    battery: null,
    speed: "50 km/h",
    weight: "13 kg",
    color: "#e67e22",
    emoji: "🏔️",
    features: ["29\" Wheels", "Hydraulic Brakes", "Carbon Fork", "Tubeless"],
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Spark E-City",
    type: "Electric",
    price: 40,
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 110,
    available: true,
    battery: 60,
    speed: "55 km/h",
    weight: "16 kg",
    color: "#3498db",
    emoji: "⚡",
    features: ["350W Motor", "45km Range", "Fenders", "Cargo Rack"],
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: "Metro Cruiser",
    type: "City",
    price: 12,
    rating: 4.5,
    reviews: 189,
    available: true,
    battery: null,
    speed: "25 km/h",
    weight: "9 kg",
    color: "#1abc9c",
    emoji: "🚲",
    features: ["3-Speed", "Step-Through", "Basket", "Lock"],
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    name: "RocketScoot V2",
    type: "Scooter",
    price: 22,
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 54,
    available: true,
    battery: 90,
    speed: "55 km/h",
    weight: "15 kg",
    color: "#e74c3c",
    emoji: "🛴",
    features: ["500W Motor", "90km Range", "Dual Brake", "Waterproof"],
  },
];

export const MY_RIDES = [
  { id: "R001", bike: "Volt Pro 3000", date: "2025-03-01", duration: "4 hrs", cost: 180, status: "Completed", distance: "28 km" },
  { id: "R002", bike: "Urban Glide S", date: "2025-02-22", duration: "2 hrs", cost: 30, status: "Completed", distance: "12 km" },
  { id: "R003", bike: "Summit Beast 29", date: "2025-03-05", duration: "6 hrs", cost: 180, status: "Active", distance: "—" },
  { id: "R004", bike: "Thunderbolt X1", date: "2025-01-14", duration: "3 hrs", cost: 75, status: "Completed", distance: "19 km" },
];

export const ADMIN_STATS = [
  { label: "Total Bikes", value: "48", change: "+3", up: true },
  { label: "Active Rentals", value: "17", change: "+5", up: true },
  { label: "Revenue Today", value: "₹12,480", change: "+18%", up: true },
  { label: "Maintenance Due", value: "4", change: "-2", up: false },
];

export const HUBS = [
  { name: "Koramangala Hub", bikes: 12, active: 8 },
  { name: "Indiranagar Station", bikes: 8, active: 5 },
  { name: "MG Road Center", bikes: 10, active: 4 },
  { name: "Whitefield Point", bikes: 9, active: 3 },
  { name: "HSR Layout", bikes: 9, active: 7 },
];

export const USERS = [
  { name: "Rahul Sharma", email: "rahul@email.com", rides: 4, spent: "₹465", member: "Gold", status: "Active" },
  { name: "Priya Singh", email: "priya@email.com", rides: 12, spent: "₹1,840", member: "Platinum", status: "Active" },
  { name: "Arjun Kumar", email: "arjun@email.com", rides: 2, spent: "₹120", member: "Silver", status: "Active" },
  { name: "Anita Roy", email: "anita@email.com", rides: 7, spent: "₹890", member: "Gold", status: "Active" },
  { name: "Vikram Das", email: "vikram@email.com", rides: 1, spent: "₹45", member: "Bronze", status: "Inactive" },
];
